# Packrift GitHub Pages Packaging Resource Corpus - Full Agent Context

Canonical site: https://packrift.github.io/
Compact agent overview: https://packrift.github.io/llms.txt
Root sitemap: https://packrift.github.io/sitemap.xml
Root robots file: https://packrift.github.io/robots.txt
Agent manifest: https://packrift.github.io/.well-known/agent-manifest.json
API catalog: https://packrift.github.io/apis.json
Agent-native API linkset: https://packrift.github.io/.well-known/api-catalog
Host metadata: https://packrift.github.io/.well-known/host-meta

## What This Resource Is

Packrift GitHub Pages Packaging Resource Corpus is a public, no-auth, read-only resource collection for inspecting Packrift packaging catalog evidence. It combines the Packrift Pack Count and Unit Signal Atlas with public sub-assets and research crosswalks:

- Packrift Procurement Readiness Index: https://packrift.github.io/procurement-readiness-index/
- Packrift SKU Evidence Cards: https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/
- Packrift Catalog Cube Efficiency Atlas: https://packrift.github.io/packrift-cube-efficiency-atlas/
- Packrift Public Research Asset Index: https://packrift.github.io/research-assets/

The corpus is designed for search engines, AI agents, procurement researchers, and packaging data reviewers that need static Packrift product evidence, public product routes, pack counts, unit signals, cube and reference dimensional-weight fields, procurement readiness fields, and SKU-level evidence cards.

## Current Public Corpus Coverage

The root Pack Count and Unit Signal Atlas exposes:

- 1,727 public product signal pages.
- Pack-count, family, product-type, unit-price-band, unit-weight-band, and pack-class index pages.
- Public data sidecars for unit signals, pack counts, family summaries, product-type summaries, schema, field dictionary, OpenAPI, Data Package, DCAT, DataCite, CFF citation, and checksums.

The Procurement Readiness Index exposes:

- A public index of procurement-readiness evidence for Packrift product records.
- SKU readiness pages and supporting product-type, price-band, readiness-status, and data sidecars.
- Public sitemap and Agent Manifest descriptors.

The SKU Evidence Cards asset exposes:

- SKU-level evidence-card pages for public Packrift product records.
- Family indexes, price-band indexes, status indexes, and supporting data sidecars.
- Public sitemap and Agent Manifest descriptors.

The Catalog Cube Efficiency Atlas exposes:

- 2,510 dimension-backed Packrift catalog rows.
- 2,589 sitemap-listed URLs covering SKU pages, cube bands, density bands, DIM-weight bands, price-per-cubic-foot bands, family rollups, product-type rollups, and data sidecars.
- CSV, JSON, JSONL, schema, stats, field dictionary, OpenAPI, Data Package, DCAT, DataCite, CFF citation, checksums, llms.txt, robots.txt, sitemap, and Agent Manifest descriptors.

The Public Research Asset Index exposes:

- One canonical crosswalk for Packrift public research assets on GitHub Pages, Vercel, and Packrift.com.
- Machine-readable asset-index JSON and JSON-LD files for dataset reviewers, maintainers, AI agents, and directories.
- Direct links to the Benchmark Navigator, Packingsolver fixture kit, Dimensional Weight Atlas, Catalog Cube Efficiency Atlas, Fit Matrix, and Operations Resource Graph.
- Explicit safe-use boundaries separating static public research data from live commerce, freight, inventory, checkout, margin, and substitute-approval workflows.

## High-Value Entry Points

- Root home: https://packrift.github.io/
- Root sitemap: https://packrift.github.io/sitemap.xml
- Root data index: https://packrift.github.io/data/
- Unit signals JSON: https://packrift.github.io/data/unit-signals.json
- Unit signals JSONL: https://packrift.github.io/data/unit-signals.jsonl
- Unit signals CSV: https://packrift.github.io/data/unit-signals.csv
- Root schema: https://packrift.github.io/data/schema.json
- Root OpenAPI: https://packrift.github.io/openapi.json
- Root OpenAPI YAML: https://packrift.github.io/openapi.yaml
- Well-known OpenAPI YAML: https://packrift.github.io/.well-known/openapi.yaml
- Root APIs.json catalog: https://packrift.github.io/apis.json
- Well-known APIs.json catalog: https://packrift.github.io/.well-known/apis.json
- Well-known API catalog linkset: https://packrift.github.io/.well-known/api-catalog
- Well-known API catalog JSON mirror: https://packrift.github.io/.well-known/api-catalog.json
- Host-meta XRD: https://packrift.github.io/.well-known/host-meta
- Host-meta JSON Resource Descriptor: https://packrift.github.io/.well-known/host-meta.json
- Human API directory: https://packrift.github.io/api-directory/
- Root Agent Manifest: https://packrift.github.io/.well-known/agent-manifest.json
- Root RO-Crate metadata: https://packrift.github.io/ro-crate-metadata.json
- Research Asset Index: https://packrift.github.io/research-assets/
- Research Asset Index JSON: https://packrift.github.io/research-assets/asset-index.json
- Research Asset Index JSON-LD: https://packrift.github.io/research-assets/asset-index.jsonld
- Procurement Readiness sitemap: https://packrift.github.io/procurement-readiness-index/sitemap.xml
- Procurement Readiness Agent Manifest: https://packrift.github.io/procurement-readiness-index/.well-known/agent-manifest.json
- SKU Evidence Cards sitemap: https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/sitemap.xml
- SKU Evidence Cards Agent Manifest: https://packrift.github.io/sku-evidence-cards/.well-known/agent-manifest.json
- Catalog Cube Efficiency Atlas: https://packrift.github.io/packrift-cube-efficiency-atlas/
- Catalog Cube Efficiency sitemap: https://packrift.github.io/packrift-cube-efficiency-atlas/sitemap.xml
- Catalog Cube Efficiency Agent Manifest: https://packrift.github.io/packrift-cube-efficiency-atlas/.well-known/agent-manifest.json
- Catalog Cube Efficiency JSONL: https://packrift.github.io/packrift-cube-efficiency-atlas/data/cube-efficiency.jsonl
- Benchmark Navigator and Packingsolver Fixtures: https://packrift-benchmark-navigator.vercel.app/
- Dimensional Weight Atlas: https://packrift-dimensional-weight-atlas.vercel.app/
- SKU Fit and Substitution Matrix: https://packrift-fit-substitution-matrix.vercel.app/
- Operations Resource Graph: https://packrift-operations-resource-graph.vercel.app/

## Representative Root Product Signal Page

https://packrift.github.io/products/212c-8x6x12-eps-foam-insulated-shipping-kit-200-white-corrugated-case-of-1/

Representative product signal pages include public Packrift evidence such as product family, product type, pack count, unit price, unit weight, unit cube, inventory signal, and canonical Packrift product route. They are for static discovery and data review, not live purchasing.

## Safe-Use Boundaries

Use this corpus for:

- Product discovery.
- Procurement comparison.
- Packaging data quality review.
- Pack-count and unit-signal inspection.
- Public Packrift citation.
- AI-agent grounding for packaging catalog facts.

Do not use this corpus as:

- A freight quote.
- A margin model.
- A supplier-cost file.
- A checkout promise.
- A current-order guarantee.
- A substitute approval system.
- A live inventory guarantee.
- A real-time price guarantee.

For live price, inventory, shipping, cart, and buyer-specific checks, use Packrift.com and the Packrift MCP endpoint at https://mcp.packrift.com/mcp.

## Contact

Packrift support: https://packrift.com/pages/contact
GitHub organization: https://github.com/Packrift
Contact email for directory and corpus review: farhan@packrift.com

Generated: 2026-06-01T17:51:55Z
